About CTH Contracting Solutions

Building quality structures and lasting relationships across Georgia since 2008.

Our Story

CTH Contracting Solutions was founded with a simple mission: provide quality construction services with integrity and professionalism. What started as a small team handling local pole barn projects has grown into a full-service contracting company serving homeowners and businesses across Georgia.

For over 15 years, we've built our reputation one project at a time. We believe in doing things right the first time—using quality materials, following best practices, and standing behind our work with comprehensive warranties.

Today, we're proud to be Georgia's trusted source for pole barns, metal roofing, fencing, and general contracting services. Our team combines old-school craftsmanship with modern techniques to deliver results that exceed expectations.

Company Photo / Team Photo

Why We Stand Out

🎯

Quality First

We never cut corners. Every project receives the same attention to detail, whether it's a small repair or a major build.

🤝

Honest Communication

Clear timelines, upfront pricing, and regular updates. You'll never be left wondering about your project.

🏆

Proven Experience

15+ years in the industry means we've seen it all. We know what works and how to solve problems efficiently.

Licensed, Insured & Experienced

Your project deserves a contractor you can trust.

Service Area

We serve communities throughout Georgia, bringing quality construction services to rural and suburban areas alike. Based in the heart of Georgia, we're local contractors who understand local needs.

Areas we serve include:

  • • Greater Atlanta Area
  • • Macon & Middle GA
  • • Augusta Region
  • • Savannah Area
  • • Columbus Region
  • • Albany & South GA
  • • Athens Area
  • • All Surrounding Counties
Georgia Service Area Map
